game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
You’ve inherited your uncle’s potion shop—and a huge debt. Better get brewing! Customize your store, hire heroes to gather ingredients, befriend (or romance) fellow vendors to learn new haggling strategies, and go head-to-head with competitors in this narrative-driven, deck-building shop simulator.

Deluxe Edition


About the Game

After the untimely death of her uncle, a penniless witch named Sylvia finds herself thrust into the role of potion proprietor. It's all up to her to carry on her uncle's legacy and keep his potion shop afloat. Thankfully, she won't have to go it alone. With help from some new friends, Sylvia must hone her negotiation skills, outsell her craftiest competitors, and make her shop THE number-one potion destination in Rafta. It’s all about mastering the finer points of Potionomics!

Key Features

Wheel and Deal
Negotiations can be tense when every coin counts, but you'll manage Sylvia’s stress with ease by playing your cards right. Develop friendships with adventurers and other shopkeepers on Rafta to learn even more advanced negotiation tactics.

Recipe for Success
Choose the best ingredients to make even basic potions extraordinary, perfecting the taste and aroma to please your pickiest customers. But beware—if you aren’t careful, you'll get some pretty gross results!

Fantastic Friends and Foes
Rafta, home to some of the world's most potent magic, is packed with big RPG personalities, each seeking a leg up in their adventures. Befriend and recruit them to help you level up your own potion game, but don't expect everyone to be friendly…

Your Shop, Your Rules
Make your shop really pop with customizable decor. Style points aren't the only perk; decorating your shop just right can improve your prices, make better quality potions, and more!
game_info.description: Welcome to Potion Shop Tycoon! You've inherited your uncle's potion shop along with a massive debt of 500 gold. Brew potions by combining ingredients, sell them to customers through strategic negotiation, and pay off your debt before time runs out. Manage your stress during negotiations, upgrade your ingredients, and become the most successful potion merchant in Rafta. Brew wisely, haggle smartly, and don't let the debt collectors catch you!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and ingredient selection
Space: Confirm selection, play negotiation card
Z: Cancel/Go back in menus
Shift: View ingredient/potion details
Enter: Start game
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Basic functionality test. Tests navigation through menus, ingredient selection, potion brewing, and customer interaction. Validates that all core game loops work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through the brewing menu, select random valid ingredients, brew a potion, and interact with the first customer. Test basic navigation and state transitions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully brew at least one potion and complete one customer negotiation without errors. Game should handle state transitions smoothly.

TEST_1.expected: Successfully brew at least one potion and complete one customer negotiation without errors. Game should handle state transitions smoothly.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements optimal strategy to pay off the 500 gold debt within the time limit. Tests whether the game is winnable through strategic play.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Prioritize brewing high-quality potions with upgraded ingredients. Use optimal negotiation strategies to maximize profit margins. Balance stress management with aggressive pricing. Focus on high-value customers first.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully pay off the 500 gold debt before the 60-day timer expires. Reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. Validate that win condition is properly triggered.
